WHERE journalist.years_working >= 21 AND journalist.nationality = 'England' AND news_report.work_type = 'Host' AND event.date = '13 October 2008' AND event.event_attendance >= 6650
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which event entities with date equal to '13 October 2008' and event attendance at least '6650', having at least one related news report record (linked on event.event_id = news_report.event_id) with work type equal to 'Host', whose news report record itself has at least one related journalist record (linked on news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id) with years working at least '21' and nationality equal to 'England'?

JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id

qa_pairs.question: Which events on 13 October 2008 had an attendance of at least 6650 and were covered by journalist Jackie Waring, who is exactly 43 years old and has worked for at most 21 years?

SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
